Examples.name: E1: FEMA P-58 assessment using external demand data
Examples.description: This example conducts a FEMA P-58 assessment of a 4-story office building.

Examples.name: E2: Shear building simulation and Hazus assessment
Examples.description: This example conducts a Hazus assessment of a 3-story office building.

Examples.name: E3: FEMA P-58 assessment with REDi recovery assessment
Examples.description: This example conducts a FEMA P-58 assessment of a 4-story office building with recovery simulation using REDi by ARUP.

Examples.name: E4: FEMA P-58 assessment with ATC138 functional recovery assessment
Examples.description: This example conducts a FEMA P-58 assessment of a 4-story office building with functional recovery simulation using the ATC138 methodology by FEMA.
